---
title: "Lilian Mary Mitchell"
---

## Lilian Mary Mitchell

**Dates:** (1847/8-1893)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

A Gosling as ‘Ugly Duckling’ c. 1865-before 1869, she was living at Kings Teignton Vicarage, Milton Abbot, Devon, in the family of the vicar the Rev. John Hawkins Hext;  whose eldest son Rear Admiral Sir John Hext (1842-1924) married her in 1874. [LG 1906, 1881 census]

### Letters

- Letter from May 25 th [1867]
- Letter from Febry 3d [1866]
- Letter from Oct 30th [1865]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
